title: Extension Mappings
description: The API returns the list of the extension mappings in GOREXTM table.

createdBy.title: Created By
createdBy.description: The name of the originator (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

createdOn.title: Created On
createdOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was created

modifiedBy.title: Modified By
modifiedBy.description: The name of the modifier (user or system) of the data. This is informational only, do not use in business logic!

modifiedOn.title: Modified On
modifiedOn.description: The date and time when the entity instance was last modified

id.title: ID
id.description: The global identifier of the extension-mappings.

baselineTable.title: Baseline Table
baselineTable.description: The name of the Banner table which is mapped with the extended table.

extendedTableName.title: Extended Table Name
extendedTableName.description: The name of the extended table which holds the extended data.

baselinePageName.title: Extended Table Description
baselinePageName.description: The name of the Banner page to surface the extended data.
